ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "resample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resampling method used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa statistic of the model */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_resample_id FOREIGN KEY ("resample_id") REFERENCES resample_methods ("resample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "model_library" TEXT /* Library or framework used for the model (e.g., scikit-learn, TensorFlow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the hyperparameters belong to */,
  "hyper_mtry" INTEGER /* Number of trees (mtry) used in the model */,
  "hyper_splitrule" TEXT /* Split rule used in the model (e.g., gini, extratrees) */,
  "hyper_min_node_size" INTEGER /* Minimum node size used in the model */,
  "hyper_learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for models that require it */,
  "hyper_max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of the trees for tree-based models */,
  "hyper_regularization" REAL /* Regularization parameter for models that require it */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resample_methods" (
  "resample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resampling method */,
  "resample_name" TEXT /* Name of the resampling method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resampling method */,
  "resample_type" TEXT /* Type of the resampling method (e.g., k-fold, leave-one-out) */,
  "resample_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters specific to the resampling method (e.g., number of folds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resample_id")
)
